req.title: Procedure record (boundary)
req.statement: A clinician shall record a Procedure tied to an Encounter. Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-036 requires that a Procedure can be recorded against an open Encounter, with boundary constraints on timestamps and numeric fields. The suite covers: (1) EP positive – valid procedure with a known encounter; (2) NEG negative – missing encounter yields 422; (3) BVA boundary – timestamp at exact epoch boundary (1970-01-01T00:00:00Z) and a numeric quantity at its minimum representable value (0.0); (4) BVA boundary – timestamp at far-future boundary and numeric quantity at a very large value; (5) DT negative – encounter field present but empty string, which is structurally malformed. This covers all mandatory case categories and multiple heuristics.

tests.name: test_create_procedure_valid_encounter
preconditions: A valid Encounter with id 'enc-001' exists and is open
actions: POST /Procedure with resourceType=Procedure, status=completed, subject and encounter references, performedDateTime=2024-06-15T10:30:00Z, code with valid coding
expected: Response body contains an id field
trace: R-HLT-036: clinician records procedure tied to encounter
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

@pytest.fixture
def open_encounter():
    return <fixture_open_encounter>  # returns 'enc-001'

def test_create_procedure_valid_encounter(open_encounter):
    enc_id = open_encounter
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Procedure",
        "status": "completed",
        "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://snomed.info/sct", "code": "73761001"}]},
        "subject": {"reference": "Patient/pat-001"},
        "encounter": {"reference": f"Encounter/{enc_id}"},
        "performedDateTime": "2024-06-15T10:30:00Z"
    }
    resp = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/Procedure", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["resourceType"] == "Procedure"
    assert "id" in body
    assert body["encounter"]["reference"] == f"Encounter/{enc_id}"

tests.name: test_create_procedure_missing_encounter_returns_422
preconditions: No encounter reference is provided in the payload
actions: POST /Procedure omitting the encounter field entirely
expected: Response body indicates encounter is required
trace: R-HLT-036: error pathway – 422 when encounter missing

tests.name: test_create_procedure_epoch_boundary_timestamp_and_zero_quantity
preconditions: A valid Encounter with id 'enc-001' exists and is open
actions: POST /Procedure with performedDateTime=1970-01-01T00:00:00Z (Unix epoch lower bound)
Include a quantity value of 0.0 (minimum numeric boundary)
trace: R-HLT-036: boundary cases on timestamps – lower epoch boundary
R-HLT-036: boundary cases on numeric elements – zero value
tests.executable:
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

def test_create_procedure_epoch_boundary_timestamp_and_zero_quantity():
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Procedure",
        "status": "completed",
        "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://snomed.info/sct", "code": "73761001"}]},
        "subject": {"reference": "Patient/pat-001"},
        "encounter": {"reference": "Encounter/enc-001"},
        "performedDateTime": "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z",
        "quantity": {"value": 0.0, "unit": "mL"}
    }
    resp = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/Procedure", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["performedDateTime"] == "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z"
    assert body["quantity"]["value"] == 0.0

tests.name: test_create_procedure_far_future_timestamp_and_large_quantity
preconditions: A valid Encounter with id 'enc-001' exists and is open
actions: Include a quantity value of 9999999.99 (large numeric boundary)
trace: R-HLT-036: boundary cases on timestamps – far-future upper boundary
R-HLT-036: boundary cases on numeric elements – large value
tests.executable:
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

def test_create_procedure_far_future_timestamp_and_large_quantity():
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Procedure",
        "status": "completed",
        "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://snomed.info/sct", "code": "73761001"}]},
        "subject": {"reference": "Patient/pat-001"},
        "encounter": {"reference": "Encounter/enc-001"},
        "performedDateTime": "9999-12-31T23:59:59Z",
        "quantity": {"value": 9999999.99, "unit": "mL"}
    }
    resp = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/Procedure", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["performedDateTime"] == "9999-12-31T23:59:59Z"
    assert body["quantity"]["value"] == pytest.approx(9999999.99)

tests.name: test_create_procedure_empty_encounter_reference_returns_422
preconditions: Encounter field is present in payload but set to empty string
actions: POST /Procedure with encounter.reference set to empty string ""
expected: Response body indicates encounter reference is invalid or missing
trace: R-HLT-036: error pathway – structurally malformed encounter reference
R-HLT-036: decision table – encounter present but empty is equivalent to missing
tests.executable:
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

def test_create_procedure_empty_encounter_reference_returns_422():
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Procedure",
        "status": "completed",
        "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://snomed.info/sct", "code": "73761001"}]},
        "subject": {"reference": "Patient/pat-001"},
        "encounter": {"reference": ""},
        "performedDateTime": "2024-06-15T10:30:00Z"
    }
    resp = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/Procedure", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert <helper_assert_error_mentions_encounter>(body)
